content.text: Всё на месте — 16 пунктов с `[Yes]`/`[N/A]` в официальном формате, пункт 16 (LLM Declaration) с корректным `[N/A]` и обоснованием. Закоммичу и запушу.

content.name: Bash
content.input:
[object Object]{"command": "cd /Users/krestnikov/giga/compression-drives-truth && git add paper_neurips/main.tex paper_neurips/main.pdf paper_neurips/references.bib && git add -f paper_neurips/main.pdf && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Official NeurIPS checklist, formal MDL propositions, contemporaneous refs, cleanup

- Replace hand-written checklist with official 16-item NeurIPS 2026 format
- Add #16 LLM Declaration (N/A — used for writing, not methodology)
- Clarify ±sd (not sem) in Table 3 caption and checklist item 7
- Formalize MDL Appendix B: three numbered Predictions with proof sketches
- Add contemporaneous work: Marty et al. 2026, Aksenov et al. 2026
- Explain 46.6% vs 43.5% discrepancy in Table 4 caption (standard vs denoising)
- Remove 6 orphaned .bib entries (DeMoss, Hutter, Halawi, Ortu, Meszaros, Bhattamishra)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"", "description": "Commit all fixes"}
